# The Mirror

> A personal notebook by Janhavi Dadhania at concavemirror.to. Long-form writing on AI architecture (agents, context windows, distributed coordination), reading notes, mathematical models of civilizational dynamics, and occasional fantasy pieces. World today is loud. Let's write it down.

Most posts on this site are works-in-progress and explicitly flagged with a "this writing is not finished yet" banner at the top — treat them as in-progress thinking rather than finished arguments.

## Blog

- [us animals and context windows](https://concavemirror.to/blog/zoo-animals-and-context-windows/): Why centralised manager-agent architectures fail at scale; distributed coordination as the only design that survives.
- [The Next AI Wave: Computers Get Bodies](https://concavemirror.to/blog/the-next-ai-wave-computers-get-bodies/): On embodiment — when the next wave of AI moves off the screen and into the real world.
- [Redesign of Superhuman Workflows Now That AI Is Here](https://concavemirror.to/blog/redesign-of-superhuman-workflows-now-that-ai-is-here/): How engineering workflows shift when junior engineering work is done by agents and the layers above are reviewing instead of doing.
- [The Map of the Agent Universe](https://concavemirror.to/blog/the-map-of-the-agent-universe/): Silicons, sub-agents, branching, distributed worker soups, and the RAG/memory stack that lets all of this scale beyond a single 200k context window.
- [My Thinking Assistant's Design](https://concavemirror.to/blog/my-thinking-assistants-design/): Designing a tool that helps think rather than helps produce — graph of topics, coffee-talk buddy, deeper-chat agent, article writer in the voice of Venkatesh Rao, Gwern, Paul Graham.

## Research

- [are agents turing machines?](https://concavemirror.to/research/are-agents-turing-machine/): Whether the question is even meaningful, and what better questions sit underneath it.
- [Hari Seldon's Framework: A Mathematical Brief](https://concavemirror.to/research/seldon-framework/): A formal translation of HariSeldon's psychohistory series into the language of dynamical systems, capital stocks, and phase transitions.
- [AI Neuroscience](https://concavemirror.to/research/ai-neuroscience/): A short note on probing inside a network with emotional stimuli and watching which neurons fire.

## Data

- [what are all different areas of AI people are working on](https://concavemirror.to/data/areas-of-ai/): A working tracker of AI sub-areas — investing, fueling, making, deploying, governing, resisting, and the second-order ripple effects.

## Fantasy

- [how to send a small satellite to the moon and take photos](https://concavemirror.to/fantasy/me-and-moon/): A practical guide to lunar CubeSat missions — mission design, propulsion, launch, trajectory, orbit insertion, imaging, link budgets.

## Other

- [Me](https://concavemirror.to/me/): About Janhavi.
- [Kindle Reads](https://concavemirror.to/kindle/): Raw text dumps of reading notes — currently Neel Nanda's 7 key papers on mechanistic interpretability.
- [RSS feed](https://concavemirror.to/rss.xml): Blog collection feed.
- [Sitemap](https://concavemirror.to/sitemap-index.xml): Auto-generated sitemap for all pages.
